notes.en: Refines AI Tasks with collapsible feature details that stay expanded before work starts and collapse by default after tasks begin.
notes.zh-CN: 优化 AI Tasks 大功能信息栏：未开始任务时默认展开，任务开始后默认折叠，并支持按大功能记住人工选择。

en: Added collapsible AI Task feature details.
Tracked expand/collapse state per feature during the current page session.
Defaulted feature details to expanded before work starts and collapsed after tasks begin.
Added localized expand and collapse labels.
Reduced AI Tasks left-pane crowding after feature work starts.
zh-CN: AI Tasks 大功能信息栏新增折叠和展开。
当前页面会话内按大功能独立记住展开状态。
未开始任务时默认展开，任务开始后默认折叠。
补齐折叠/展开多语言文案。
减少大功能开始执行后左侧信息栏占用空间。
